18#ifndef MEDIA_C_CAPABILITIES_H_
19#define MEDIA_C_CAPABILITIES_H_
20
21#include "properties.h"
22
23#ifdef __cplusplus
24extern "C" {
25#endif
26
37typedef list_t capabilities_t;
38
45static inline capabilities_t* capabilities_new(size_t initial_capacity) {
46 return list_new(initial_capacity, sizeof(properties_t*));
47}
48
55static inline capabilities_t* capabilities_new_simple(properties_t** properties) {
56 capabilities_t* capabilities = list_new(1, sizeof(properties_t*));
57 (void)list_add(capabilities, properties);
58 return capabilities;
59}
60
67static inline void capabilities_free(capabilities_t* capabilities, void (*free_func)(void*)) {
68 list_free(capabilities, free_func);
69}
70
78static inline bool capabilities_add(capabilities_t* capabilities, properties_t** properties) {
79 return list_add(capabilities, properties);
80}
81
89static inline properties_t** capabilities_get(const capabilities_t* capabilities, size_t index) {
90 return (properties_t**)list_get(capabilities, index);
91}
92
101static inline bool capabilities_set(const capabilities_t* capabilities, size_t index, properties_t** properties) {
102 return list_set(capabilities, index, properties);
103}
104
111static inline size_t capabilities_capacity(const capabilities_t* capabilities) { return capabilities->capacity; }
112
119static inline size_t capabilities_size(const capabilities_t* capabilities) { return capabilities->size; }
120
127static inline bool capabilities_empty(const capabilities_t* capabilities) { return capabilities->size == 0U; }
128
135static inline void capabilities_clear(capabilities_t* capabilities, void (*free_func)(void*)) {
136 list_clear(capabilities, free_func);
137}
138
145static inline capabilities_t* capabilities_duplicate(const capabilities_t* original) {
146 capabilities_t* duplicate = NULL;
147 if (original != NULL) {
148 duplicate = capabilities_new(capabilities_capacity(original));
149 if (duplicate != NULL) {
150 bool success = true;
151 for (size_t i = 0; (i < capabilities_size(original)) && success; ++i) {
152 properties_t** original_properties = capabilities_get(original, i);
153 if (original_properties == NULL) {
154 success = false;
155 } else {
156 properties_t* new_properties = properties_duplicate(*original_properties);
157 if (new_properties == NULL) {
158 success = false;
159 } else if (!capabilities_add(duplicate, &new_properties)) {
160 properties_free(new_properties, NULL);
161 success = false;
162 } else {
163 /* item added successfully */
164 }
165 }
166 }
167 if (!success) {
168 capabilities_free(duplicate, NULL);
169 duplicate = NULL;
170 }
171 }
172 }
173 return duplicate;
174}
175
182static inline void capabilities_iterate(const capabilities_t* capabilities, void (*callback)(properties_t**)) {
183 if ((capabilities != NULL) && (callback != NULL)) {
184 for (size_t i = 0; i < capabilities_size(capabilities); ++i) {
185 properties_t** properties = capabilities_get(capabilities, i);
186 callback(properties);
187 }
188 }
189}
190
198static inline void capabilities_inspect(const capabilities_t* caps, int (*print_func)(const char*, ...),
199 const char* indent) {
200 (void)print_func("%sCapabilities:\n", indent);
201 char new_indent[10];
202 size_t indent_len = 0U;
203
204 if (indent == NULL) {
205 indent = "";
206 }
207
208 while ((indent[indent_len] != '\0') && (indent_len < (sizeof(new_indent) - 2U))) {
209 new_indent[indent_len] = indent[indent_len];
210 ++indent_len;
211 }
212
213 new_indent[indent_len] = '\t';
214 new_indent[indent_len + 1U] = '\0';
215 for (size_t i = 0; i < capabilities_size(caps); ++i) {
216 const properties_t* cap_properties = *capabilities_get(caps, i);
217 properties_inspect(cap_properties, print_func, new_indent);
218 }
219}
220
221#ifdef __cplusplus
222}
223#endif
